_comment: Scene 1 smoke test — voice-quality check before regenerating the full chapter. Restored 'Claude' (was 'Clawd' over-correction), em-dash flow, fewer hard stops, 'read me file' for README phonetic.

scenes.text: This is a self-drive course — you digest the read me file, then you give Claude the setup file, and Claude does the work. It asks you questions, you ask it back. Simple.
